name: Work Grill nativization & package establishment

dates.duration_note: Single-day sprint. Final metrics: 16 shipped / 0 in_progress / 0 not_shipped; 16 issues closed (closed_in_sprint 1); gates: 10+ alignment reviews incl. two FAIL→PASS cycles, process-adherence close review PASS, 6+ package-qa runs; 3 npm publishes (0.1.0, 0.2.1, 0.2.2) + 1 deprecation (0.2.0).

team.name: team-lead
team.owns: arbitration, src/template content, one-off authoring, final approval

team.name: scribe
team.owns: sprint/issue JSON, CONTEXT.md terms, the Retro Loop

goal: Make the Work Grill native to the framework — methodology-namespace move (EXEC-001), restored ADR policy (EXEC-003), JSON-native PRD/issue schemas (EXEC-004), philosophy-scan (EXEC-005), completed deviation catalog (EXEC-006) — and establish the to-execution package under personal ownership (EXEC-012 through EXEC-016).

shipped.title: JSON-native work artifacts: prd.schema.json + issue schema extension
shipped.summary: prd.schema.json + issue-schema extension landed Src-First with root mirrors; PRD-001 converted md→JSON and schema-validated; the three issue stopgaps (acceptance criteria in description, PRD linkage in related_tickets, slice type in notes) now have schema homes for future issues.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. Gates: alignment_review_pass logged in tmp/exec/prd-001_progress.json.

shipped.title: Restore ADR policy across framework docs
shipped.summary: ADR policy restored across all live docs Src-First: Two-decision-records principle (ADRs at grill time, retro at sprint close), ADR glossary term added, no-ADR statements swept to zero; location stays generic pending EXEC-001.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. Gates: alignment_review_pass logged in tmp/exec/prd-001_progress.json. tmp/ historical logs untouched by design.

shipped.title: Philosophy-scan subagent in the Setup Grill
shipped.summary: Philosophy-scan added to the Setup Grill: read-only sweep proposes evidence-backed candidates before the open question; acceptance verified against terminal-game (8 candidates, documented conventions all surfaced).
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. src/SKILL.md is the sole copy — nothing to mirror. Gates: alignment_review_pass logged in tmp/exec/prd-001_progress.json.

shipped.title: npm account confirmation + name ruling
shipped.summary: npm identity confirmed brooksryan via interactive login + whoami verification; unscoped name to-execution ruled and registry-availability verified.

shipped.title: Git init with per-repo personal identity
shipped.summary: git init -b main with repo-local personal identity; root commit 25ed028, 37 files, author+committer brooksryan; global config untouched.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. Identity ratified as-is by Brooks (no amend). exec_012_done logged in tmp/exec/prd-002_progress.json.

shipped.title: GitHub repo created and pushed under brooksryan
shipped.summary: brooksryan/execution-set-up created and pushed gh-mediated under the personal account; credential isolation hardened repo-locally (usehttppath + username pin, fail-closed verified); visibility public per Team Lead ruling.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. exec_013_done + credential_isolation_applied logged in tmp/exec/prd-002_progress.json. Visibility superseded to PUBLIC by Brooks's direct ruling to packager ('repo can be public, nothing to hide'), flipped and verified 2026-06-07.

shipped.title: Publish preflight guards + manifest metadata
shipped.summary: prepublishOnly preflight (src/bin/preflight.js) with 6 fail-closed identity/state guards, each inversion-tested to abort; repository/author/engines metadata added; package-qa PASS; pushed via plain git as live proof of the seeded personal credential.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. Third package_qa_pass logged in tmp/exec/prd-002_progress.json; commits 71a7208 and 95b1211 on origin.

shipped.title: First publish 0.1.0
shipped.summary: to-execution@0.1.0 published to npm under brooksryan with all six fail-closed guards enforced at publish time; npx scratch-dir acceptance byte-identical to local stamp; name reserved. One procedure deviation recorded: token staged out-of-repo via NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG after the in-repo path correctly tripped the clean-tree guard.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. Registry-verified: to-execution@0.1.0, shasum 21894432ab8493face209febfa4af101ec8be3ac. prd-002_progress.json current_step complete; token hygiene swept.

shipped.title: Move methodology docs out of the Instance repo root
shipped.summary: Namespace decided: .excn/ per ADR-0002, grounded in .excn/research/agent-context-loading.md; implementation slices published as EXEC-018…022.

shipped.title: Template restructure to .excn layout + src/ cross-reference sweep
shipped.summary: Template restructured to the .excn namespace per ADR-0002 with history-preserving renames; CLAUDE.md removed from the template (pointer is CLI-owned); full src/ cross-reference sweep; slice-1 package-qa rubric co-updated; latent gitignore defect fixed (template tmp gitkeeps were never tracked — root tmp/ pattern matches at any depth; skeleton force-added).
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. All five acceptance criteria met; alignment_review_pass logged in tmp/exec/prd-001_progress.json.

shipped.title: CLI stamps .excn layout; ensureGitignore removed
shipped.summary: CLI stamps the .excn layout; ensureGitignore deleted — init writes nothing outside the manifest; host root .gitignore proven untouched by sha256 under both plain and --force runs; package-qa PASS.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. Evidence in tmp/exec/prd-003_progress.json; commits e941e9c + a1977bf on origin.

shipped.title: CLI pointer-block append
shipped.summary: CLI-owned pointer block (13 lines, explicit .excn paths) wired by wirePointers() outside the manifest walk — force-unreachable by construction; dual-file append with visible sentinel; all nine PRD inversion cases pass; package-qa PASS.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. package-qa PASS 0 violations across 45 behavioral checks; commit 224a20b on origin (cli.js + in-window rubric update per M2).

shipped.title: Root Instance migration to .excn
shipped.summary: Root Instance migrated to .excn with full history preserved; invariant mirrors refreshed from src; root de-touched to two CLI-stamped pointer files; ADR-0001 placed; the product migrated its own first customer.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. Alignment PASS (entry 13, .excn/tmp/prd-001_progress.json); ADR-0001 finalized by packager, separately gated (e266892); root top level: .claude .excn AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md README.md src.

shipped.title: Publish to-execution@0.2.0
shipped.summary: to-execution@0.2.1 published behind all six guards after acceptance test A caught a real 0.2.0 packaging defect (npm pack consumed the nested .gitignore as an ignore spec and stripped it); fix = ecosystem-standard un-dotted template gitignore + CLI stamp-time rename; registry stamp byte-identical to local; 0.2.0 deprecated.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. Registry-verified: to-execution@0.2.1 latest, shasum 92a42705c42eee8487fff14e8186556948fae71d, 0.2.0 deprecated on-registry; package-qa PASS 47/47; commit 24a17a0 + tag v0.2.1; token hygiene confirmed. prd-003_progress current_step complete.

shipped.title: Flatten .excn — remove the tmp/ nesting
shipped.summary: Work-tracking flattened into .excn per Brooks's directive — tmp level removed everywhere, ephemeral/committed split preserved via explicit stamped ignore set; first alignment FAIL→fix→resubmit cycle ran on this slice (dead root-pointer path caught by the gate); 0.2.2 published and registry-verified byte-identical; packager additionally caught a second sweep casualty in cli.js usage text.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. All five acceptance criteria met. Registry-verified: to-execution@0.2.2, shasum a585c0a90bd2bf190cd31a2f8b39a5d3adb9a020; commit 26a5ed6 + tag v0.2.2; package-qa PASS 44 checks; ignore semantics ruled stay-ephemeral by Brooks; alignment PASS cycle 2 (entries 14/15).

shipped.title: Complete the deviation catalog: grill-with-docs against a scratch Instance
shipped.summary: Deviation catalog completed against a registry-stamped 0.2.2 scratch Instance: six deviations from grill-with-docs's three reference files, quoted, filed as EXEC-024…029; fork direction + glossary-format adoption ruled live by Brooks.
shipped.notes: Shipped 2026-06-07. HITL grill run with Brooks against the EXEC-023 flat shape (npx to-execution@0.2.2 scratch Instance).

decisions.title: npm package named to-execution
decisions.summary: Team Lead ruling 2026-06-07, superseding PRD-002's execution-scaffold: the npm package is to-execution (registry 404 verified). Repo name stays execution-set-up under brooksryan.

decisions.title: ADR-0001 approved: personal ownership of the published artifact
decisions.summary: GitHub repo and npm package live under the personal account brooksryan; the work identity never pushes or publishes this artifact. Approved 2026-06-07; draft at tmp/exec/drafts/adr-0001-personal-ownership.md pending the EXEC-001 location.

decisions.title: EXEC-002 held out of sprint 1
decisions.summary: Team Lead ruling: P3 polish; stays in the backlog unassigned.

retrospective_notes.title: Issue schema has no owner field
retrospective_notes.body: The Team Lead assigned EXEC-004 an owner, but issue.schema.json (additionalProperties: false) has no owner property. Ownership is recorded on the sprint work item instead. Relevant to EXEC-004's schema extension.

retrospective_notes.title: Approved breakdown existed only as message text
retrospective_notes.body: PRD-002's P1-P5 slice breakdown was approved from a teammate message and was on no file on disk when publication was ordered; scribe had to round-trip to packager for the verbatim text before writing EXEC-012 through EXEC-016.

retrospective_notes.title: Shouldn't be this complicated
retrospective_notes.body: Brooks, verbatim: 'Shouldn't be this complicated.' The Team Lead turned cosmetic ratifications (commit name, repo visibility) into blocking ceremony — EXEC-012/013 sat executed-but-held while rulings landed. The critique: identity questions that have a sane default should default-and-flag, not block. Source: Team Lead ruling exchange, 2026-06-07.

retrospective_notes.title: Guards shaped procedure over instruction
retrospective_notes.body: Team Lead's prescribed token-staging path (src/.npmrc) violated the preflight's own clean-tree guard; packager chose an out-of-repo userconfig rather than weakening the guard — guards should shape procedure, not the reverse. Third instance this sprint of a gate catching Team Lead instruction error. Source: Team Lead, EXEC-016 ship report, 2026-06-07.

retrospective_notes.title: Unanchored gitignore pattern silently untracked template skeleton
retrospective_notes.body: Root .gitignore's unanchored tmp/ pattern silently excluded src/template's tmp skeleton from git since the root commit — published tarball was complete (npm files: whitelist) but a fresh clone was not. Caught only because git mv refused to move untracked files during EXEC-018. Gitignore patterns in stamped output deserve anchoring review (.excn/.gitignore's tmp/ is scoped by nesting, which is the fix-by-design). Source: Team Lead, EXEC-018 ship report, 2026-06-07.

retrospective_notes.title: npm pack semantics bit twice; the registry-artifact acceptance test is the catch that worked
retrospective_notes.body: npm pack semantics bit twice in one sprint (root gitignore depth-matching untracked the template skeleton; nested .gitignore consumed+stripped from the tarball). Both caught by gates (git mv refusal; acceptance test A), neither by review. Packaging-boundary behaviors deserve acceptance tests from the registry artifact, not just local verification — the A-test's npx-vs-local byte-diff is the pattern that worked. Source: Team Lead, EXEC-022 ship report, 2026-06-07.

retrospective_notes.title: First alignment FAIL: sweep verification missed the live Instance's own entry points
retrospective_notes.body: First alignment FAIL: Team Lead's sweep verification grepped src/ and docs but not the root pointer files — the live Instance's own entry points are part of every path-changing change-set. The gate caught it (dead pointer path in root CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md, ellipsis residue in the authoring guide); the verification checklist should have. FAIL→fix→PASS logged as entries 14/15 in .excn/prd-001_progress.json — the project's first FAIL-cycle of the Retro Loop gate. Source: Team Lead, EXEC-023 migration report, 2026-06-07.

retrospective_notes.title: Mechanical sweep crossed an ownership boundary
retrospective_notes.body: Team Lead's mechanical sed sweep crossed an ownership boundary into packager's cli.js and damaged two lines, one unnoticed until packager's own review. Cross-cutting sweeps should either exclude other owners' files explicitly or hand the owner a list of hits to fix — sed doesn't respect the roster. Source: Team Lead, EXEC-023 ship report, 2026-06-07.

retrospective_notes.title: SendMessage success is not delivery
retrospective_notes.body: Four consecutive SendMessage dispatches reported success but never delivered to scribe across an overnight harness sleep; caught only by the Team Lead checking disk state against expectations. SendMessage success is not delivery; dispatches that change teammate obligations need a disk-visible acknowledgment convention.

retrospective_notes.title: Long-lived dispatch state belongs in spawn prompts or on disk
retrospective_notes.body: The undelivered-message incident ended in the scribe session being killed and the whole team recreated, with the full work queue baked into the new spawn prompt — spawn prompts are the one delivery channel that cannot be lost. Long-lived dispatch state belongs in spawn prompts or on disk, not only in message history.
